name: Symptoms of my work lung disease showed up 2 years later. Too late to file?

mainEntity.name: Symptoms of my work lung disease showed up 2 years later. Too late to file?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, from diagnosis/last exposure; file soon.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, file from diagnosis/discovery; analyze last exposure for occupational diseases in Utah.[1] Key factors: (1) Prompt reporting key; (2) Deadlines from awareness; (3) Medical causation proven.[1] See doctor now, document history; attorney handles timing nuances.[1] Delayed symptoms covered.
